name: Changzhou Shenli Electrical Machine Incorporated Company
summary: Changzhou Shenli Electrical Machine Incorporated Company manufactures and sells laminations/cores for large-middle size motors and generators worldwide. The company offers stator/rotor laminations and cores for diesel generators, wind power generators, medium-voltage and high-voltage motors, railway motors, elevator motors, AC motors, etc. It also provides stator/rotor cores of various step motors, such as DC step motors, AC/DC brushless motors, DC servo motors, motors with series excitation and shaded pole, other universal AC/DC micro motors for household and commercial use, etc. Changzhou Shenli Electrical Machine Incorporated Company was founded in 1991 and is based in Changzhou, China.
